name: Akamai Technologies, Inc.
description: Akamai Technologies, Inc. is a global cloud computing, security, and content delivery network (CDN) service provider. The company secures and delivers digital experiences for many of the world's largest enterprises. Through its massive distributed edge platform, Akamai offers solutions for web and mobile performance, cloud security, enterprise access, and video delivery, helping organizations protect their applications, APIs, and infrastructure from cyber threats while ensuring fast and reliable content delivery to users worldwide.
